requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / Performance for LED Lamps — Senegalese Energy Programme vs EU Ecodesign
requirement_topic.zh: LED 灯能效／性能——塞内加尔能源计划对比欧盟生态设计
requirement_topic.zht: LED 燈能效／性能——塞內加爾能源計劃對比歐盟生態設計

summary.en: Senegal does not operate an EU-style binding Ecodesign Regulation that sets a single market-wide minimum efficacy with mandatory CRI, lifetime, and power-factor thresholds. Instead, energy efficiency for lighting in Senegal is addressed through national energy programmes and any applicable energy-labelling/efficiency requirements, alongside the broader ECOWAS/UEMOA regional efficient-lighting initiatives that have promoted minimum-efficacy benchmarks for the region. Where a minimum-performance or labelling requirement applies, conformity is demonstrated against the relevant national/regional benchmark and, for regulated imports, verified through the Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC process. Products must be rated for 230 V, 50 Hz, and documentation must be in French. The EU 'ecodesign' lane therefore maps to Senegal's energy-label / national-energy-programme framework, not to a directly equivalent horizontal regulation — confirm the current applicable benchmark with ASN and the importer.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔不实施欧盟式具约束力的生态设计法规（即设定单一全市场最低能效并强制规定 CRI、寿命及功率因数阈值）。塞内加尔照明能效通过国家能源计划及任何适用的能效标签／能效要求处理，并配合更广泛的 ECOWAS/UEMOA 区域高效照明倡议（该倡议为本区域推动了最低能效基准）。当适用最低性能或标签要求时，符合性须对照相关国家／区域基准证明，受管制进口则经贸易部符合性／PEC/VoC 流程验证。产品须按 230 V、50 Hz 额定，文件须为法语。因此欧盟 ecodesign 项对应至塞内加尔的能效标签／国家能源计划框架，而非直接等效的横向法规——请与 ASN 及进口商确认现行适用基准。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾不實施歐盟式具約束力的生態設計法規（即設定單一全市場最低能效並強制規定 CRI、壽命及功率因數閾值）。塞內加爾照明能效通過國家能源計劃及任何適用的能效標籤／能效要求處理，並配合更廣泛的 ECOWAS/UEMOA 區域高效照明倡議（該倡議為本區域推動了最低能效基準）。當適用最低性能或標籤要求時，符合性須對照相關國家／區域基準證明，受管制進口則經貿易部符合性／PEC/VoC 流程驗證。產品須按 230 V、50 Hz 額定，文件須為法語。因此歐盟 ecodesign 項對應至塞內加爾的能效標籤／國家能源計劃框架，而非直接等效的橫向法規——請與 ASN 及進口商確認現行適用基準。

standards_or_laws: Senegalese national energy / energy-efficiency programme and any applicable energy-labelling requirement (confirm current scope with ASN / energy authority)
Regional efficient-lighting benchmarks (ECOWAS / UEMOA initiatives) where applicable; Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC for regulated imports

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 （Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires）, defining three grades: Grade 1 ≥90 lm/W, Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W, Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W （minimum for CN market entry）, with mandatory China Energy Label （CEL） registration administered by SAMR. GB 30255 sets absolute lm/W thresholds but does not bind CRI, lifetime, or power factor in the comprehensive way the EU Ecodesign Regulation does. China's CEL is not recognised in Senegal.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个等级：1 级 ≥90 lm/W、2 级 ≥80 lm/W、3 级 ≥70 lm/W（中国市场准入最低值），并由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理强制性中国能效标识（CEL）注册。GB 30255 设定绝对 lm/W 阈值，但未像欧盟生态设计法规那样全面约束 CRI、寿命或功率因数。中国 CEL 不被塞内加尔认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個等級：1 級 ≥90 lm/W、2 級 ≥80 lm/W、3 級 ≥70 lm/W（中國市場准入最低值），並由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理強制性中國能效標識（CEL）注冊。GB 30255 設定絕對 lm/W 閾值，但未像歐盟生態設計法規那樣全面約束 CRI、壽命或功率因數。中國 CEL 不被塞內加爾認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: The structural gap is that Senegal has no single binding horizontal Ecodesign regulation like the EU; minimum-performance expectations come from national energy programmes and regional efficient-lighting benchmarks rather than one market-access efficacy floor with mandatory CRI/lifetime/power-factor. Practical points for a China-to-Senegal exporter: （1） a product meeting CN GB 30255 Grade 2 （≥80 lm/W） is generally well placed against typical regional efficient-lighting benchmarks, while Grade 3 （70 lm/W） may be marginal — confirm the applicable Senegalese/regional minimum; （2） China's CEL registration does not transfer; any Senegalese energy-label or efficiency requirement is verified separately through the Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC route; （3） documentation must be in French and routed via an in-country importer; （4） because the regime is national-programme-based rather than a fixed regulation, the exact applicable benchmark must be confirmed with ASN/the energy authority for the current period. Do not assume EU Ecodesign thresholds apply in Senegal.
gap.zh: 结构性差距在于塞内加尔无欧盟式单一具约束力的横向生态设计法规；最低性能预期来自国家能源计划及区域高效照明基准，而非单一的市场准入能效下限并强制规定 CRI／寿命／功率因数。中国出口至塞内加尔的实务要点：（1）满足中国 GB 30255 2 级（≥80 lm/W）的产品通常能较好满足典型区域高效照明基准，而 3 级（70 lm/W）可能临界——请确认适用的塞内加尔／区域最低值；（2）中国 CEL 注册不可转移；任何塞内加尔能效标签或能效要求须通过贸易部／PEC/VoC 路径单独验证；（3）文件须为法语并经在地进口商办理；（4）由于该制度基于国家计划而非固定法规，须就当前期间与 ASN／能源主管部门确认确切适用基准。请勿假定欧盟生态设计阈值适用于塞内加尔。
gap.zht: 結構性差距在於塞內加爾無歐盟式單一具約束力的橫向生態設計法規；最低性能預期來自國家能源計劃及區域高效照明基準，而非單一的市場准入能效下限並強制規定 CRI／壽命／功率因數。中國出口至塞內加爾的實務要點：（1）滿足中國 GB 30255 2 級（≥80 lm/W）的產品通常能較好滿足典型區域高效照明基準，而 3 級（70 lm/W）可能臨界——請確認適用的塞內加爾／區域最低值；（2）中國 CEL 注冊不可轉移；任何塞內加爾能效標籤或能效要求須通過貿易部／PEC/VoC 路徑單獨驗證；（3）文件須為法語並經在地進口商辦理；（4）由於該制度基於國家計劃而非固定法規，須就當前期間與 ASN／能源主管部門確認確切適用基準。請勿假定歐盟生態設計閾值適用於塞內加爾。

mandatory_status.target: Programme-dependent — no EU-style binding Ecodesign regulation; minimum-performance / energy-label requirements derive from national energy programmes and regional benchmarks, verified through Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC where applicable (confirm current scope with ASN)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: ASN (Association Senegalaise de Normalisation) / national energy authority — applicable efficiency benchmark to be confirmed

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Senegal has no EU-style binding Ecodesign regulation; energy-efficiency expectations come from national energy programmes and regional efficient-lighting benchmarks, so the EU 'ecodesign' lane maps to Senegal's energy-label / energy-programme framework rather than a directly equivalent horizontal law. A China GB 30255 Grade 2 （≥80 lm/W） product is generally well positioned; Grade 3 may be marginal against regional benchmarks. China's CEL does not transfer — any Senegalese efficiency or label requirement is verified through the Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC route. Confirm the current applicable benchmark with ASN and provide French documentation via an in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塞内加尔无欧盟式具约束力的生态设计法规；能效预期来自国家能源计划及区域高效照明基准，故欧盟 ecodesign 项对应至塞内加尔能效标签／能源计划框架，而非直接等效的横向法律。中国 GB 30255 2 级（≥80 lm/W）产品通常定位良好；3 级对照区域基准可能临界。中国 CEL 不可转移——任何塞内加尔能效或标签要求须通过贸易部／PEC/VoC 路径验证。请与 ASN 确认现行适用基准，并经在地进口商提供法语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塞內加爾無歐盟式具約束力的生態設計法規；能效預期來自國家能源計劃及區域高效照明基準，故歐盟 ecodesign 項對應至塞內加爾能效標籤／能源計劃框架，而非直接等效的橫向法律。中國 GB 30255 2 級（≥80 lm/W）產品通常定位良好；3 級對照區域基準可能臨界。中國 CEL 不可轉移——任何塞內加爾能效或標籤要求須通過貿易部／PEC/VoC 路徑驗證。請與 ASN 確認現行適用基準，並經在地進口商提供法語文件。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling / Product Registration — No EU-Style EPREL; Senegalese Label vs CN CEL
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签／产品注册——无欧盟式 EPREL；塞内加尔标签对比中国 CEL
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤／產品註冊——無歐盟式 EPREL；塞內加爾標籤對比中國 CEL

summary.en: Senegal does not operate an EU-style EPREL database registration or a rescaled A-G energy label as a horizontal pre-market obligation for light sources. Where energy labelling applies, it is through a national energy-labelling programme （and, regionally, harmonised efficient-lighting/labelling initiatives under ECOWAS/UEMOA） rather than the EU EPREL/A-G framework. Any required energy-label display and supporting performance data are handled within that national programme, with regulated-import conformity verified through the Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC process. The label and consumer information must be in French, and an in-country importer typically manages registration and customs clearance through Dakar. There is no EU-style obligation to register in EPREL or to print the EU A-G class — confirm the current national labelling requirement and format with ASN / the energy authority.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔不实施欧盟式 EPREL 数据库注册，也不实施作为光源横向上市前义务的重新调整 A-G 能效标签。当适用能效标签时，通过国家能效标签计划（区域上为 ECOWAS/UEMOA 下的协调高效照明／标签倡议）处理，而非欧盟 EPREL/A-G 框架。任何所需的能效标签展示及支撑性能数据均在该国家计划内处理，受管制进口的符合性经贸易部符合性／PEC/VoC 流程验证。标签及消费者信息须为法语，通常由在地进口商经达喀尔办理注册及清关。不存在欧盟式在 EPREL 注册或印制欧盟 A-G 等级的义务——请与 ASN／能源主管部门确认现行国家标签要求及格式。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾不實施歐盟式 EPREL 數據庫註冊，也不實施作為光源橫向上市前義務的重新調整 A-G 能效標籤。當適用能效標籤時，通過國家能效標籤計劃（區域上為 ECOWAS/UEMOA 下的協調高效照明／標籤倡議）處理，而非歐盟 EPREL/A-G 框架。任何所需的能效標籤展示及支撐性能數據均在該國家計劃內處理，受管制進口的符合性經貿易部符合性／PEC/VoC 流程驗證。標籤及消費者信息須為法語，通常由在地進口商經達喀爾辦理註冊及清關。不存在歐盟式在 EPREL 註冊或印製歐盟 A-G 等級的義務——請與 ASN／能源主管部門確認現行國家標籤要求及格式。

standards_or_laws: Senegalese national energy-labelling programme (no EU-style EPREL registry or A-G rescaled label as a horizontal obligation as of this review — confirm with ASN / energy authority)
Regional ECOWAS / UEMOA efficient-lighting / labelling initiatives where applicable; Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC for regulated imports

summary.en: China's China Energy Label （CEL） under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires; products must be registered with CQC / CECP before affixing the CEL, which shows Grade 1–3 on absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between China's CEL scheme and any Senegalese or regional labelling programme — registration and labelling must be done afresh for the target market.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）；产品须在贴附 CEL 前向 CQC／CECP 注册，CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1–3 级。中国 CEL 方案与任何塞内加尔或区域标签计划之间不存在互认——须为目标市场重新办理注册和贴标。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）；產品須在貼附 CEL 前向 CQC／CECP 註冊，CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1–3 級。中國 CEL 方案與任何塞內加爾或區域標籤計劃之間不存在互認——須為目標市場重新辦理註冊和貼標。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Senegal has no EU-style EPREL registry and no mandatory EU A-G rescaled label, so the EU-specific EPREL/registration step does not apply when shipping China-to-Senegal — do not assume it does. The real gaps are: （1） China's CEL registration does not transfer to Senegal; any Senegalese energy-label requirement must be met afresh under the national programme; （2） the label and all consumer information must be in French （China's CEL is in Chinese）; （3） registration/clearance is typically handled by an in-country importer through Dakar, with conformity verified via the Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC route; （4） because Senegal's labelling regime is national-programme-based and may evolve, the exact current requirement, label format, and whether registration is needed must be confirmed with ASN / the energy authority. The practical burden is lighter than the EU （no EPREL portal registration） but is not zero — a French-language national label may still be required.
gap.zh: 塞内加尔无欧盟式 EPREL 注册系统，也无强制欧盟 A-G 重新调整标签，故中国出口至塞内加尔时不适用欧盟特有的 EPREL／注册步骤——请勿假定其适用。真正的差距为：（1）中国 CEL 注册不可转移至塞内加尔；任何塞内加尔能效标签要求须在国家计划下重新满足；（2）标签及所有消费者信息须为法语（中国 CEL 为中文）；（3）注册／清关通常由在地进口商经达喀尔办理，符合性经贸易部／PEC/VoC 路径验证；（4）由于塞内加尔标签制度基于国家计划且可能演变，须就确切现行要求、标签格式及是否须注册与 ASN／能源主管部门确认。实务负担轻于欧盟（无 EPREL 门户注册）但并非为零——可能仍须法语版国家标签。
gap.zht: 塞內加爾無歐盟式 EPREL 註冊系統，也無強制歐盟 A-G 重新調整標籤，故中國出口至塞內加爾時不適用歐盟特有的 EPREL／註冊步驟——請勿假定其適用。真正的差距為：（1）中國 CEL 註冊不可轉移至塞內加爾；任何塞內加爾能效標籤要求須在國家計劃下重新滿足；（2）標籤及所有消費者信息須為法語（中國 CEL 為中文）；（3）註冊／清關通常由在地進口商經達喀爾辦理，符合性經貿易部／PEC/VoC 路徑驗證；（4）由於塞內加爾標籤制度基於國家計劃且可能演變，須就確切現行要求、標籤格式及是否須註冊與 ASN／能源主管部門確認。實務負擔輕於歐盟（無 EPREL 門戶註冊）但並非為零——可能仍須法語版國家標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Programme-dependent — no EU-style EPREL registry or mandatory A-G rescaled label; any energy-label requirement derives from the national programme and is verified through Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC (confirm current requirement and format with ASN)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: ASN (Association Senegalaise de Normalisation) / national energy authority — labelling requirement and format to be confirmed; no EU-style EPREL identified as of this review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Senegal has no EU-style EPREL database registration and no mandatory EU A-G rescaled label as a horizontal obligation; any energy labelling derives from a national programme （and regional ECOWAS/UEMOA initiatives）, verified through the Ministry of Trade / PEC/VoC route. China's CEL registration does not transfer and the EU EPREL step does not apply — do not assume it does. Any Senegalese label and consumer information must be in French and handled via an in-country importer. Confirm the current national labelling requirement, format, and whether registration is needed with ASN / the energy authority before placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塞内加尔无欧盟式 EPREL 数据库注册，也无作为横向义务的强制欧盟 A-G 重新调整标签；任何能效标签来自国家计划（及区域 ECOWAS/UEMOA 倡议），经贸易部／PEC/VoC 路径验证。中国 CEL 注册不可转移，欧盟 EPREL 步骤不适用——请勿假定其适用。任何塞内加尔标签及消费者信息须为法语并经在地进口商办理。投放前请与 ASN／能源主管部门确认现行国家标签要求、格式及是否须注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塞內加爾無歐盟式 EPREL 數據庫註冊，也無作為橫向義務的強制歐盟 A-G 重新調整標籤；任何能效標籤來自國家計劃（及區域 ECOWAS/UEMOA 倡議），經貿易部／PEC/VoC 路徑驗證。中國 CEL 註冊不可轉移，歐盟 EPREL 步驟不適用——請勿假定其適用。任何塞內加爾標籤及消費者信息須為法語並經在地進口商辦理。投放前請與 ASN／能源主管部門確認現行國家標籤要求、格式及是否須註冊。
